headline: 2 Profitable Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 We Find Risky
summary: Even if a company is profitable, it doesn’t always mean it’s a great investment. Some struggle to maintain growth, face looming threats, or fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their future potential.

headline: Talkspace Stockholders Vote to Approve Acquisition by UHS
summary: NEW YORK, May 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Talkspace, Inc. (“Talkspace”) (Nasdaq: TALK) today announced that at the special meeting of Talkspace stockholders held on May 29, 2026, the Talkspace stockholders voted to approve the acquisition of Talkspace by Universal Health Services, Inc. headline: Universal Health Services Reshapes GW Hospital Ties As Behavioral Chief Exits
summary: Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS) has agreed to shift clinical services at George Washington University Hospital to a new physician-led nonprofit group affiliated with UHS. The agreement changes how clinical operations in the D.C. hospital are structured, with the nonprofit set to assume financial responsibility for these services. Separately, the President of UHS's Behavioral Health Division has resigned, with interim leadership stepping in during the transition. For investors...
